scripts.archive: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules .turbo apps/*/.turbo packages/*/.turbo

tasks.label: Typecheck, lint & format
tasks.prompt: Run `bun typecheck`, `bun lint`, and `bun fmt` in sequence. Report and fix any issues found.

tasks.label: Run tests
tasks.prompt: Run `bun run test` and report results. Fix any failing tests.

tasks.label: Security review
tasks.prompt: Review recent changes for security vulnerabilities including XSS, injection, WebSocket auth issues, and OWASP top 10 concerns.
